title: Check for 7bit ascii
description: Only allow characters from the 7bit ASCII set.

title: Check abapdoc
description:
Various checks regarding abapdoc.
Base rule checks for existence of abapdoc for public class methods and all interface methods.

title: Allowed object naming
description: Enforces basic name length and namespace restrictions

title: Check allowed object types
description: Restricts the set of allowed object types.

title: Check for ambigious statements
description:
Checks for ambiguity between deleting or modifying from internal and database table
Add "TABLE" keyword or "@" for escaping SQL variables

title: Avoid use of certain statements
description: Detects usage of certain statements.

title: Check BEGIN END names
description: Check BEGIN OF and END OF names match

title: Chain mainly declarations
description: Chain mainly declarations

title: Check abstract methods and classes
description:
Checks abstract methods and classes:
- class defined as abstract and final,
- non-abstract class contains abstract methods

title: Check Comments
description: Various checks for comment usage.

title: Check DDIC
description: Checks the types of DDIC objects can be resolved, the namespace of the development/errors can be configured in "errorNamespace"

title: Check INCLUDEs
description: Checks INCLUDE statements

title: Check if NO_HANDLER can be removed
description: Checks NO_HANDLER pragmas that can be removed

title: Check syntax
description: Enables syntax check and variable resolution

title: Check text elements
description: Check text elements exists or matches code

title: Check transformation exists
description: Checks that used XSLT transformations exist.

title: Class attributes naming
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for class variable names.

title: Check cloud types
description: Checks that the package does not contain any object types unsupported in cloud ABAP.

title: Colon missing space
description: Checks for missing spaces after colons in chained statements.

title: Find commented code
description: Detects usage of commented out code.

title: Check constructor visibility is public
description: Constructor must be placed in the public section, even if the class is not CREATE PUBLIC.

title: Code contains tab
description: Checks for usage of tabs (enable to enforce spaces)

title: Place definitions in top of routine
description: Checks that definitions are placed at the beginning of methods.

title: Description in class must exist
description: Ensures descriptions in class metadata exist.

title: Double space
description: Checks that only a single space follows certain common statements.

title: Downport statement
description: Experimental downport functionality

title: Find empty lines in statements
description: Checks that statements do not contain empty lines.

title: Remove emty statement
description: Checks for empty statements (an empty statement is a single dot)

title: Find empty blocks
description: Checks that the code does not contain empty blocks.

title: Find EXIT or CHECK outside loops
description:
Detects usages of EXIT or CHECK statements outside of loops.
Use RETURN to leave procesing blocks instead.

title: EXPORTING can be omitted
description: Detects EXPORTING statements which can be omitted.

title: Forbidden Identifier
description: Forbid use of specified identifiers, list of regex.

title: Forbidden Void Type
description: Forbid use of specified void types.

title: No dashes in FORM names
description: Checks for a Dash in form names

title: TABLES parameters are obsolete
description: Checks for TABLES parameters in forms.

title: Fully type constants
description: Checks constants for full typing - no implicit typing allowed.

title: Use functional writing
description: Detects usage of call method when functional style calls can be used.

title: Global class checks
description:
Checks related to global classes.
* global classes must be in own files
* file names must match class name
* global classes must be global definitions

title: Identical FORM names
description: Detects identically named FORMs

title: IF in IF
description: Detects nested ifs which can be refactored to a single condition using AND.

title: Implement methods
description: Chekcs for abstract methods and methods from interfaces which need implementing.

title: In-statement indentation
description: Checks alignment within block statement declarations which span multiple lines, such as multiple conditions in IF statements.

title: Indentation
description: Checks indentation

title: Inline data, old versions
description: Checks for inline data declarations in older releases. Only active for versions less than v740sp02

title: Keep single parameters on one line
description: Keep single parameter calls on one line

title: Keyword case
description: Checks that keywords have the same case. Non-keywords must be lower case.

title: Line break multiple parameters
description: Line break multiple parameters

title: Line length
description: Detects lines exceeding the provided maximum length.

title: Line containing only punctuation
description: Detects lines containing only punctuation.

title: Local class naming conventions
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for local class names.

title: Local testclass location
description: Checks that local test classes are placed in the test include.

title: Local variable naming conventions
description:
Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for local variables, constants and field symbols.
Regexes are case-insensitive.

title: Main file contents
description: Checks related to report declarations.

title: Max one statement per line
description: Checks that each line contains only a single statement.

title: Check MESSAGE exists
description: In message statements, check that the message class + id exist

title: Method Length
description: Checks relating to method length.

title: Method parameter naming conventions
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for method parameter names

title: Mix of returning and exporting
description: Checks that methods don't have a mixture of returning and exporting/changing parameters

title: MSAG consistency check
description: Checks the validity of messages in message classes

title: Check nesting depth
description: Checks for methods exceeding a maximum nesting depth

title: New line between methods
description: Checks for newlines between method implementations.

title: No public attributes
description:
Checks that classes and interfaces don't contain any public attributes.
Exceptions are excluded from this rule.

title: Object naming conventions
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for object names

title: Obsolete statements
description: Checks for usages of certain obsolete statements

title: Parser error
description: Checks for syntax unrecognized by abaplint

title: Prefer Inline Declarations
description:
Prefer inline to up-front declarations.
Activates if language version is v740sp02 or above.
Variables must be local(METHOD or FORM).
No generic or void typed variables.
First position used must be a full/pure write.

title: Prefer RETURNING to EXPORTING
description: Prefer RETURNING to EXPORTING. Generic types cannot be RETURNING.

title: Preferred compare operator
description: Configure undesired operator variants

title: Prefix is current class
description: Reports errors if the current class or interface references itself with "current_class=>"

title: Reduce string templates
description: Checks for string templates

title: Release iDoc
description: Checks idoc types and segments are set to status released

title: Remove descriptions
description: Ensures you have no descriptions in metadata of methods, parameters, etc. For class descriptions, see rule description_empty.

title: RFC error handling
description: Checks that exceptions 'system_failure' and 'communication_failure' are handled in RFC calls

title: Selection screen naming conventions
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern, such as a prefix, for selection-screen variable names.

title: Sequential blank lines
description: Checks that code does not contain more than the configured number of blank lines in a row.

title: Short CASE
description: Checks for CASE statements which have fewer than the specified number of branches

title: SICF consistency
description:
Checks the validity of ICF services:

* Class defined in handler must exist
* Class must not have any syntax errors
* Class must implement interface IF_HTTP_EXTENSION

title: Space before colon
description: Checks that there are no spaces in front of colons in chained statements.

title: Space before dot
description: Checks for extra spaces before dots at the ends of statements

title: Escape SQL host variables
description: Escape SQL host variables, from 740sp05

title: Start at tab
description: Checks that statements start at tabstops.

title: Super class final
description: Checks that classes which are inherited from are not declared as FINAL.

title: TABL enhancement category must be set
description: Checks that tables do not have the enhancement category 'not classified'

title: TRY without CATCH
description: Checks for TRY blocks without a CATCH and CLEANUP block

title: TYPE BEGIN contains single field
description: Finds TYPE BEGIN with just one INCLUDE TYPE

title: Type FORM parameters
description: Checks for untyped FORM parameters

title: TYPES naming conventions
description: Allows you to enforce a pattern for TYPES definitions

title: Unknown types
description: Enables check for unknown data types, respects errorNamespace

title: Unreachable code
description: Checks for unreachable code.

title: Unused variables
description: Checks for unused variables

title: Use NEW
description: Checks for deprecated CREATE OBJECT statements.

title: WHEN OTHERS last
description: Checks that WHEN OTHERS is placed the last within a CASE statement.

title: Whitespace at end of line
description: Checks for redundant whitespace at the end of each line.

title: XML consistency
description: Checks the consistency of main XML files, eg. naming
